login.title: Welcome Back
login.description: Sign in to continue your learning journey

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent password reset instructions.
forgotPassword.successNote: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or try again.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.description: Enter your new password below. Make sure it's at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.invalidDescription: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.missingDescription: No password reset token found. Please use the link from your email.
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been updated. Redirecting you to sign in...

verification.title: Check Your Email
verification.description: We've sent a verification link to
verification.instruction1: Click the link in the email to verify your account
verification.instruction3: Check your spam folder if you don't see it

errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

guard.title: Sign in to Save Progress
guard.description: You need to be signed in to mark tutorials as complete and track your learning journey.
